caption: A man with a beard and mustache is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and "AN" visible, a black baseball cap, headphones, and a gold watch. He sits behind a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, white banners feature the word "HUSTLE" and several gold stars, while a red and black logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" along with smaller text saying "PODCAST". The same "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo is overlaid on the bottom left of the screen. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; he begins with his hand near his chin, looks slightly to his right in the second frame, turns his head further to the right in the third frame, and remains looking to the side in the final frame.
